scripts.setup: node scripts/setup.js && yarn install && yarn set-version
scripts.build:master: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode master && yarn zipper
scripts.build: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build && yarn zipper
scripts.build:playbuz: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz && yarn zipper
scripts.build:playbuz-jp-qa: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-jp-qa && yarn zipper
scripts.build:playbuz-tw-production: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-tw-production && yarn zipper
scripts.build:playbuz-jp-production: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-jp-production && yarn zipper
scripts.build:quuboo: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode quuboo && yarn zipper
scripts.build:japan: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode japan && yarn zipper
scripts.build:japan-dev: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode japan-dev && yarn zipper
scripts.build:singapore: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode singapore && yarn zipper
scripts.build:singapore-dev: yarn set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode singapore-dev && yarn zipper
